summary: V5-A envelope is INSUFFICIENT. Engine fires (POST /api/trpc/message.newChat returned 200, ~900 byte response, content-type application/json) but the SPA tRPC client STILL throws TRPCClientError 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object' — identical to #687 root cause. Warning bubble NOT rendered (chat panel empty, shows only mistral logo and 'Ask anything' input). HP-Mistral-3 hypothesis (superJSON ['undefined'] meta transformers) is FALSIFIED: stripping ['undefined'] entries did not eliminate the parse failure. Escalate to V5-B (tRPC v11 single-result shape).

network_observations.v5a_size_match: approximate (~900B observed including headers, body likely close to 786B target — much smaller than v4 1563B baseline)
network_observations.raw_response_body_capture: FAILED — DevTools showed 'Failed to load response data — No data found for resource with given identifier' (small-body race condition with SW); content-type header confirmed application/json

trpc_error_summary.name: TRPCClientError
trpc_error_summary.message: Cannot convert undefined or null to object
trpc_error_summary.cause: TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object
trpc_error_summary.logger_source: 71429-1ab3c5bf56f640c7.js:45 (tRPC client wrapper, same minified bundle as #687)

dom_scan.chat_panel_state: empty — only Mistral logo + 'Ask anything' input + Sign in/Sign up buttons (anonymous user)
dom_scan.user_message_bubble: absent (input cleared after submission but no echo bubble appeared)

pass_fail_classification.rationale: Per spec: 'engine fires (786B response observed) but bubble still missing — V5-A insufficient → escalate to V5-B (tRPC v11 single-result shape)'. Match exact: 200 status received, response size in V5-A range (~786-900B vs v4 1563B), but TRPCClientError persists and no bubble rendered.
pass_fail_classification.mission_protection: HELD (no real PII decode, no LLM response leak)

hypothesis_status.HP-Mistral-3_superJSON_undefined_meta: FALSIFIED — V5-A stripped ['undefined'] entries + corresponding null-valued fields, but TRPCClientError unchanged. Root cause is NOT superJSON ['undefined'] meta transformers.

next_step_recommendation.reasoning: V5-A used compact envelope (786B) but kept tRPC v10 batch shape ([{result:{...}}]). The TRPCClientError 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object' suggests the SPA bundle (45659.js, e.from at line 45 of 71429-…) expects a different envelope shape. V5-B tRPC v11 single-result {result:{data:...}} (no array wrapper) is next candidate.
next_step_recommendation.alternative: V5-D — if V5-B parse succeeds but bubble still missing, SPA chat renderer is rejecting shape regardless of tRPC parse
